g.text: FABIO wages per item for Trinidad and Tobago (TTO) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the World Bank reference
is TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. No external strand benchmark covers this country. Items grouped as
"Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB across years). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs
FABIO wages [GLORIA] — Trinidad and Tobago (TTO) (value-added sub-account)
